name: Extract, Escape, Upgrade
description: Core loop for entering dream zones, collecting resources, escaping, and investing upgrades.

steps.name: Enter
steps.description: Players select a dream zone and load into an unstable run.

steps.name: Collect
steps.description: Players locate memory shards while choosing how much risk to take.

steps.name: Escape
steps.description: Players reach an extraction portal before the zone collapse finishes.

steps.name: Upgrade
steps.description: Players spend recovered shards on persistent squad upgrades.
